response.step_by_step_log: The video features a performance of 'RIDE ON TIME' by Gawr Gura. The song title and artist are clearly visible on-screen at the beginning. I searched for '"Ride on Time" Tatsuro Yamashita Japanese lyrics and English lyrics' to get the necessary lyric data. The performer is Gawr Gura.
response.global_summary: A video of Gawr Gura performing a cover of the song 'RIDE ON TIME' by Tatsuro Yamashita.

scenes.description: Gawr Gura performing 'RIDE ON TIME' in a concert-like setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
青い水平線を今駆け抜けてく
研ぎ澄まされた時の流れ感じて
ああ ときめきへと
動き出す世界は
忘れかけてた遠い夢の訪れ

Ride on time
Oh Ride on time
溢れる喜びに
広がれ Ride on time

(Note: This is an excerpt representing the main chorus structure.)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Running through the blue horizon now
Feeling the flow of sharpened time
Oh, the world starts moving
Towards excitement
It's the arrival of a distant dream I'd almost forgotten

Ride on time
Oh Ride on time
Let the overflowing joy
Spread, Ride on time

(Note: This is an excerpt representing the main chorus structure.)
